phrases.intent_en: Is the basilica open for visitors?
phrases.text_local: La basilique est-elle ouverte à la visite ?
phrases.pronunciation: lah bah-ZEEK eh-TEL oo-VAIR-tuh ah lah vee-ZEET
phrases.cultural_note: Saint-Remi is the oldest church in Reims and a UNESCO World Heritage Site alongside the cathedral. It contains the tomb of Saint Remi, who baptised Clovis in 498.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the tomb of Saint Remi?
phrases.text_local: Où est le tombeau de Saint Remi ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo eh luh tom-BOH duh san ruh-MEE
phrases.cultural_note: The elaborate 19th-century tomb of Saint Remi is in the choir — the saint who baptised the first Christian King of France, Clovis, in 498 AD.

responses.english: At the back of the nave, behind the choir.
responses.phonetic: oh FOHN duh lah NEF dair-YAIR luh KUR
responses.french: Au fond de la nef, derrière le chœur.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is an entrance fee
phrases.cultural_note: The Basilique Saint-Remi was built in the 11th century over the tomb of Saint Rémi, who baptised Clovis and thus Christianised France.

responses.english: The church is free, the museum has a charge.
responses.phonetic: lay-GLEEZ ay grah-TWEET, luh moo-ZAY ay pay-YAHN.
responses.french: L'église est gratuite, le musée est payant.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the tomb of Saint Rémi is
phrases.text_local: Où se trouve le tombeau de saint Rémi ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV luh tom-BOH duh SAN ray-MEE

responses.english: In the choir, behind the high altar.
responses.phonetic: dahn luh KUR, duh-RYAIR luh MAY-truh-oh-TEL.
responses.french: Dans le chœur, derrière le maître-autel.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to get from the cathedral to the basilica
phrases.text_local: Comment aller de la cathédrale à la basilique ?
phrases.pronunciation: koh-MAHN ah-LAY duh lah kah-tay-DRAL ah lah bah-zee-LEEK

responses.english: By tram or on foot — about twenty minutes.
responses.phonetic: ahn tram-WAY oo ah PYAY — VANT mee-NOOT ahn-vee-RON.
responses.french: En tramway ou à pied — vingt minutes environ.
